rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION, ITS VS. TERESA GRIFFITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Enforcing Settlement Agreement And Reqeust For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 3. Defendant Teresa Griffith's Motion for Order Enforceing Settlement Agreement - grant. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T. FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Sergio Silva Lainez'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 4. Defendant Sergio Lainez's Motion to Quash Service of Summons to be heard by Judge Alvarado on 10/26/11 in D501 after calendar call by Judge Quidachay. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUCIA MALIWAT VS. PAULINA A. LARGAESPADA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery To Establish Admissions From Deft, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 5. Plaintiff Lucia Maliwat's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses, Establish Admissions and Sanctions is off calendar per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAO KENG LIN VS. XIAO LING MEI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 1. Defendant Xiao Ling Mei's Demurrer to Complaint - grant without leave to amend. Defendant occupied premises for more than one year therefore 60 day notice required - CCP 1946.1(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FAMA PROPERTIES CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. MARY ZENCINCI et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 2. Defendant Mary Zenciri-Ehm's Demurrer to Complaint is off calendar. Amended Complaint filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DUNCAN JEUNG VS. VLADIMIR ARUTYUNYANTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton And Motion To Compel Attendance Of Pltf At Depoisition And To Produce Documents And For Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011, line 6. Defendants Vladimir Arutyunyants and Gayane Arutyunyants' Motion to Compel Plaintiff Duncan Jeung at Deposisition, Produce Documents and Sanctions - grant. No oppositon filed. Sanctions in the amount of $1840.00. Subject to opposition. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
